name: codex-augment-dispatcher
description: Route agent work through reliable cross-harness delivery, dynamic workflow artifacts, MCP helpers, subagent fanout, extensible external CLI adapters, high-quality media guidance, GSAP motion guidance, deterministic asset workflows, and Plugin evidence. Adds ui-ux-closed-loop for full requirements-to-prototype-to-UI/UX with external references.

interface.shortDescription: Auto-route reliable workflows, MCP helpers, subagents, media, frontend, GSAP motion, assets, and full UI/UX design loops (with external references).
interface.longDescription: Codex Augment Dispatcher is an extensible adapter hub for reliable cross-harness engineering delivery, platform-neutral agent dynamic workflows, MCP helper surfaces, external CLIs, high-quality media guidance, GSAP motion guidance, deterministic generated-asset workflows, and background thread/subagent fanout while preserving the owner agent as the local executor and verifier. It should be considered for non-trivial tasks and explicitly triggered by reliable-agent-workflow, deep analysis, deep optimization, optimization plans, design-review-implement, Best-of-N, check-work, zero-open-issue repair loops, workflow artifacts, workflow scripts, ultracode, Claude Code dynamic workflows, .claude/workflows interop, approval gates, subagents/packets, background threads, agent threads, worker-agent fanout, planning/decomposition, stuck/brainstorming, current research/latest info, external critique/risk review, creative direction, frontend/UI/landing page/redesign/animation, GSAP/ScrollTrigger/parallax motion, browser visual verification, image/video asset generation, generated icon/sprite sheet slicing, and Grok video requests. SVG and emoji are prohibited as default visual assets; custom icons default to image_gen sheets sliced with asset-slicer. The initial adapters are reliable-agent-workflow, dynamic-workflow, Claude task-gate/thinking-gate, Grok augment, AGY frontend, GSAP animation guidance, asset-slicer, dispatcher MCP, and mcp-generator. **New: ui-ux-closed-loop for complete requirements/product-thinking/low-fi-prototype to polished UI/UX orchestration, referencing external skills (frontend-design, ui-ux-pro-max, wireframe-prototyping, Vercel guidelines, etc.) via install guidance and composition instead of hardcoding their content.** Future CLI adapters can be added as separate skills, scripts, tests, and dispatch rules without renaming the plugin.
defaultPrompt: Before non-trivial work, classify the route; required helper routes need Plugin evidence.

Route reliable/workflow/UI/media/assets via reliable-agent-workflow, dynamic-workflow, task-gate, AGY, GSAP, image_gen/slicer. For visual product work use ui-ux-closed-loop to drive the full chain with external references.
Fan out read-only subagents by default for independent research/review/validation; owner keeps final claims.
